summary: Verified BUG FIX: crosshair 'Center guides' on /bottle-preview are now correctly positioned at the vertical center of the bottle (y=47%) and NOT at the bottom (was previously reusing LOGO_ANCHORS y=60%). Tested both templates, toggle behavior, layout, logo upload regression, and logo-size buttons.

verified_behaviors.preview_column_class: space-y-6 lg:col-span-8 lg:order-1 (Live Preview on LEFT, larger)
verified_behaviors.logo_upload_and_display: Logo successfully rendered on front bottle at 35%,60% (LOGO_ANCHORS.bottle1) with proper size scaling
verified_behaviors.logo_size_45_click_effect: Larger-logo warning modal appeared; parent style width changed via logoBoxWidthPct()
verified_behaviors.crosshair_decoupled_from_logo_anchors: Confirmed: BOTTLE_CENTERS is separate from LOGO_ANCHORS (still x:35 y:60 for logo). Guides use bottleCenter.x/y.

critical_code_review_comments: BottlePreview.js is large (~1400+ lines). Consider splitting into sub-components (LivePreview, LogoControls, EditingTools) for maintainability.
Numeric anchor constants (BOTTLE_CENTERS, LOGO_ANCHORS) are duplicated shapes; could be a single per-bottle config object {logoAnchor, center} to prevent future drift between the two.
seed_data_creation: None. Small 32x32 PNG created in /tmp/testlogo/logo.png for upload regression only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix (crosshair center guides positioning on /bottle-preview) fully verified via Playwright DOM measurement. Dot pixel positions measured programmatically: bottle1 at exactly (36%, 47%) and bottle2 at exactly (49%, 47%) of the preview container. Toggle works. Logo upload and 35/40/45/50 size buttons render only AFTER a logo is uploaded (conditional rendering) — this is expected behavior. LOGO_ANCHORS remains at y=60% for logo placement (front label area), which is correct and unrelated to the crosshair fix.
rca of the issue: Previously the crosshair guides re-used LOGO_ANCHORS (bottle1 y=60%, bottle2 y=55%), which anchor the *logo* to the front label area (~60% down = lower body). Fix: introduced separate BOTTLE_CENTERS = {bottle1:{x:36,y:47}, bottle2:{x:49,y:47}} and a centerFor() helper. The JSX crosshair block (data-testid='center-guides') now uses bottleCenter.x/y instead of logoPosition/anchor, placing the vertical dashed line through the front bottle x-center and the horizontal line + dot at the true vertical mid-body of the bottle image.
